metadata.author: Paul
metadata.subject: The Ministry of the New Testament and the Ministers of the New Testament.

3: And we all with unveiled face, beholding and reflecting like a mirror the glory of the Lord, are being transformed into the same image from glory to glory, even as from the Lord Spirit.
5: So then if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation; the old things have passed away; behold, they have become new.
12: And He has said to me, My grace is sufficient for you, for My power is perfected in weakness.
13: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ and the love of God and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all.

18.text: Transformation is a metabolic process where the old element of our natural life is replaced by the new element of the divine life as we behold the Lord.

14.text: The fellowship of the Spirit is the transmission of the love of the Father and the grace of the Son into the believers for their enjoyment.
